title: Mekanism: Quantum Quarries
body:
**ATTENTION: This mod is still in an alpha stage of development. Breaking changes and instability should be expected.**

Inspired by ExtraUtilities2 (RIP), this mod makes use of Mekanism's vast interface to bring to you: **Quantum Quarries for Mekanism!**

They might be expensive, but they are certainly worth getting: they require no upkeep but energy (a lot of energy!), and they can be used to dispose of unwanted items. And you're ready to go! 

## NOTE:

**In order to properly initialize the database, a non-flat world must be loaded before use anywhere else! Keep in mind that this will take a while, depending on the accuracy setting. This is a one-time process for sampling real chunk data with any combination of mods.**

## Roadmap
(in no particular order)  
 - "silktouch" and "luck" modes (however they might work, I'm open for suggestions)
 - sampling and ming in another dimensions besides the Overworld
